t.title: Request Resident Portal Access

div.p: Fill in your details to get access to your society portal

input.name: owner_id
input.placeholder: Search owner by name or email (optional)

div.p: Thank you for submitting your access request.

div.span: Approval may take up to 72 hours.
Once approved, you will receive an email with a link to set your password and access the resident portal.
